chapter_title.ar: باب ذَبِيحَةِ الصَّبِيِّ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ وَ الْأَعْمَى
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – The slaughter by the child, and the woman, and the blind

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/23)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/23)
text: كَانَتْ لِعَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) جَارِيَةٌ تَذْبَحُ لَهُ إِذَا أَرَادَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from hammad, from Al Halby,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘There used to be a slave girl for Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> who used to slaughter for him<sup>asws</sup> whenever he<sup>asws</sup> so intended’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, had a slave-girl who would slaughter animals if he (the Imam) wanted.”’
